fields.title: Create plan.md mode prompt
fields.description: Write extensions/tau/src/prompt/modes/plan.md — the system prompt for plan mode. Based on codex's plan collaboration mode but adapted for tau: 3 phases (ground in environment, intent chat, implementation chat), <proposed_plan> block for finalization, but plan output is formalized as beads epics/tasks rather than immediately executed.
fields.close_reason: Created plan.md mode prompt at extensions/tau/src/prompt/modes/plan.md
